name: Xflow
description: Xflow — India cross-border payment platform for exporters to collect international payments and repatriate funds via FIRA and FIRC.

seo.title: Xflow — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Xflow: Xflow — India cross-border payment platform for exporters to collect international payments and repatriate funds via FIRA and FIRC.

when_to_use: Collecting international payments for Indian exporters via FIRA
Repatriating foreign currency to India with FIRC compliance
Cross-border invoice collection for Indian SaaS exporters

cons: Not useful for domestic India payments
review.verdict: Smart niche play for Indian exporters sick of bank paperwork — real pain killer for the right use case.
review.best_for: Indian exporters and freelancers collecting international payments needing FIRA compliance
review.not_for: Non-Indian businesses or domestic Indian payment acceptance needs
